# docs

This folder contains the static GitHub Pages landing page for the public
PRT benchmark repository.

`index.html` is generated from
`3.public-repo/side_artifact_templates/index.html.template` and embeds a
small JSON-LD dataset record for crawler discoverability. The full
machine-readable Croissant metadata remains at `../croissant.json`.

The page is documentation only; it is not an input to scoring,
normalization, or analytics.
